homeRoute.description: Deep link path to open (e.g. 'home'). Produces scheme://homeRoute?screenshotParams=...

matrix.description: Param variations to iterate over (cartesian product). Each key creates a subfolder level.

copyTo.description: Copy screenshots to this directory after completion

devices.description: Device names to capture on (fuzzy matched against available simulators)

globalParams.description: Extra params sent with every scenario

killBetweenPermutations.description: Kill and relaunch the app between matrix permutations (requires bundleId)

captureDelay.description: Delay in ms after done() before taking the screenshot, for animations to settle (default: 200)

password.description: Optional password (must match the password configured in the app)

waitAfterPermutationChange.description: Extra delay in ms after globalSetup re-runs on permutation change, for async data to settle (default: 0)

name.description: Device name (fuzzy matched against available simulators)

extraWait.description: Extra wait in ms after each screenshot on this device (default: 0)

timeout.description: Timeout in ms waiting for done() (default: 30000)
